$comment: StudioToWosMapping records — one per PolicyObject. Demonstrates all 4 mapping states. Illustrative.

targets.compilerNote: DecisionTable projects 1:1 to parent kernel decisionTables[*] entry per Kernel §4.5.1 (landed 2026-05-01). Row ids preserved; hit policy explicit; round-trip lossless.
Transition guard becomes a structured DecisionTableGuard ({kind: 'decisionTable', ref: 'eligibilityTable', outputColumn: 'eligible', inputBindings: {...}}) per Kernel §4.5.1.

extensionsApplied.$comment: Per ADR-0077 x- patternProperties; ExtensionRecord candidate to promote to first-class field queued in studio-to-wos-mapping.md.

mappings.$comment: Supersession is workspace metadata. Its CONSEQUENCE projects via the affected PolicyObjects' mappings (e.g., the appeal-right's requestMethods now includes phone+in-person+written).

mappings.$comment_until_ratified: Compiler emits an x-wos-studio.applicability envelope at workflow root + derived FEL appliesWhen on per-element notices. Once parent ratifies wos-workflow.schema.json#applicabilityScope, this mapping migrates to mapsToWos with the new target.

extensionRecord.proposedSemantics: Workflow-level applicability metadata (jurisdictions, programs) at the $wosWorkflow root, complementing per-element appliesWhen FEL. Today, jurisdiction is implicit via wos-delivery sidecar's appliesWhen; promoting to a top-level field would let external verifiers parse the workflow's applicability without parsing FEL.
extensionRecord.proposedSchemaSketch: { jurisdictions: [{kind, code, displayName}], programs: [string], temporalScope: { intervals: [{start, end}] } }
extensionRecord.$comment: Per studio-to-wos-mapping.md slight extension proposals queue; until ratified, compiler emits derived FEL appliesWhen on relevant elements + an x-wos-studio.applicability envelope at the workflow root.

mappings.unmappedRationale: Workspace-specific operational practice (single county). NOT generalized into a WOS extension because the practice is too local to warrant cross-workspace adoption. Per SA-MUST-map-041 and SA-MUST-cmp-023, this mapping is enumerated in release notes but does not produce $wosWorkflow body content.
mappings.$comment: MAP-LINT-004 perpetual-warn fires; reviewer override by workspace-owner authority grant approved this state.
